# WwwAuthenticate.IsInsufficientScopeChallenge method

Returns `true` when *challenge* is an insufficient-scope (`403`) challenge (R-23.1-ab).

```csharp
public static bool IsInsufficientScopeChallenge(WwwAuthenticateChallenge challenge)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| challenge | The parsed challenge. |

## Return Value

`true` when its `error` is `insufficient_scope`.
